description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with four turned legs and a sturdy frame, featuring a glossy tabletop adorned with a vibrant image of two colorful parrots. The table's surface is smooth and reflective, suggesting a protective glass or lacquer finish over the artwork. On top of the table, there is a large, matte black pitcher with a curving handle and spout, as well as a smaller matching cup, both with classical shapes. The legs are robust and slightly ornate, providing both stability and a touch of traditional style. The table appears well-crafted, with clean lines and a solid build, suitable for both decorative and functional use. The overall aesthetic is a blend of classic furniture design and modern, eye-catching tabletop art.
description: A sturdy wooden table with four ornate legs and a glossy top featuring a vivid parrot image, accompanied by a black pitcher and cup. The table combines traditional craftsmanship with a modern artistic touch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tabletop artwork, pitcher, and cup, with all four legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the table and the parrot image, with the pitcher and cup aligned front-to-back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tabletop art from the opposite side, with the pitcher and cup positions reversed from the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the table's length and the arrangement of the pitcher and cup, with the parrot image partially visible.
